SOURCE_DOC: Which installed music service plugin should resolve tracks.
TRIGGER_MODE_DOC: When to add the next AI-picked track.
KEEP_AHEAD_COUNT_DOC: Only used when trigger mode is 'Keep N tracks ahead'.
COOLDOWN_SEC_DOC: Minimum time between two automatic AI triggers. Lower = more responsive but may queue rapidly. Set to 0 to disable. Default 5s.
HISTORY_WINDOW_DOC: How many recent tracks to include as context for the recommender.
AVOID_ALBUM: Avoid same album within N tracks
AVOID_ALBUM_DOC: Don't recommend another track from any album that appears in the last N history entries. 0 disables this rule. Default 10.
AVOID_ARTIST: Avoid same artist within N tracks
AVOID_ARTIST_DOC: Don't recommend another track by any artist that appears in the last N history entries. 0 disables. Default 0 (off) since it heavily restricts choice.
HTTP_API_PORT_DOC: Port for the built-in one-tap remote page (http://<volumio-ip>:PORT/). Set to 0 to disable. Default 3001.
OPEN_REMOTE_DOC: Opens the one-tap Like/Dislike/Next remote page in a new browser tab. From your phone, tap Share → Add to Home Screen for an app-like icon.
REMOTE_URL_TOAST: Open on phone: {{url}} — Add to Home Screen for one-tap access.
FEEDBACK_USE_SKIP: Treat skipped tracks as implicit dislikes
FEEDBACK_USE_SKIP_DOC: When ON, skipping a track early (< ~30%) automatically records it as a dislike for the AI. When OFF (default), skips are ignored — only the explicit 👍/👎 buttons affect recommendations.
RECOMMENDER_DOC: Pick one AI source. You can switch any time.
LLM_PROVIDER_DOC: Pick any provider. OpenAI-compatible ones share one code path; Anthropic and Google use their native APIs. Ollama runs on your own machine with no API key.
LLM_API_KEY_DOC: Leave empty only if you selected Ollama.
LLM_MODEL_DOC: Pick a model from this provider. Use '(default)' if you're unsure. To use a model not listed here, type it in the 'Custom model name' field below.
LLM_MODEL_DOC_OLLAMA: Pick a model you have pulled via 'ollama pull <name>'. Not listed here? Type the name below.
LLM_MODEL_CUSTOM_DOC: If the dropdown above doesn't have what you want, type the exact model identifier here. When non-empty, this overrides the dropdown.
LLM_BASE_URL_DOC: Only used when provider is 'Custom'. Must be an OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions endpoint root. Example: http://192.168.0.10:11434/v1
LLM_HINTS_DOC: Extra guidance appended to the prompt. You can freely edit this text or load a preset above.
LLM_SYSTEM_PROMPT_DOC: The full system prompt. You can edit it freely or load a preset above. Must instruct the model to return {"artist":"...","title":"..."} JSON.
PROMPT_PRESET_DOC: Pick a built-in personality for the AI recommender.
PROMPT_SUB_DOC: Pick a specific flavor within the selected preset. '(parent default)' uses the preset's generic text.
APPLY_PROMPT_PRESET_DOC: Copies the selected preset text into the system prompt textarea below. Reload the page to see it. You can then edit.
HINT_PRESET_DOC: Pick a built-in taste hint to copy into the hint textarea.
APPLY_HINT_PRESET_DOC: Copies the selected hint text into the hints textarea below. Reload the page to see it.
ENERGY_RANGE_DOC: The AI will prefer tracks with energy/intensity between these two values. 0=ambient/silent, 10=chaotic/peak. Leave as 0–10 to not constrain.
PRESET_LOADED: Preset loaded into textarea. Reload this page to see, then Save.
OPEN_PROMPT_BROWSER_DOC: Opens the current system prompt as plain text in a new browser tab. Use Cmd/Ctrl+S to save it as a file.
OPEN_HINTS_BROWSER_DOC: Opens the current hints as plain text in a new browser tab.
EXPORT_PROMPT_FILE_DOC: Writes current prompt and hint text to /data/plugins/music_service/ai_autopilot/system_prompt.txt and hints.txt so you can edit via SSH (nano, vim, VS Code Remote, etc.). Click Import after editing.
IMPORT_PROMPT_FILE_DOC: Reads system_prompt.txt and hints.txt from plugin data dir and loads them into the live config.
EXPORT_OK: Wrote to {{path}}. SSH in and edit, then click Import.
IMPORT_OK: Loaded prompt ({{p}} chars) + hints ({{h}} chars) from files. Save to activate.
IMPORT_MISSING: Files not found. Click Export first to create them.
SPOTIFY_REFRESH_TOKEN_DOC: One-time OAuth refresh token with 'user-top-read' scope.
RUN_NOW_DOC: Ask the recommender immediately and queue one track.
DRY_RUN_DOC: Recommender + search, but do not modify the queue. Result is shown as a toast and logged.
LIST_SOURCES_DOC: Print the names of all installed music_service plugins to the log.
UPDATE_BUTTON_DOC: Download the latest version from GitHub (main branch) and install it in place. Your history, feedback, prompts and API keys are kept.
UPDATE_DONE: Updated to {{sha}}. Disable and re-enable the plugin (or restart Volumio) to apply.
SOURCES_LISTED: See log: journalctl -u volumio | grep ai_autopilot
LIKE_CURRENT_DOC: Record the currently playing track as liked. Future recommendations will lean toward similar artists/tracks.
DISLIKE_CURRENT_DOC: Record the currently playing track as disliked. This artist/track will be avoided in future recommendations.
FEEDBACK_STATUS_DOC: Print a summary of liked/disliked tracks to the log and toast.
FEEDBACK_SUMMARY: {{likes}} liked, {{dislikes}} disliked (incl. auto-skips). See log for details.
SOURCE_NOT_INSTALLED: Source plugin not installed or not running.
